title: Apollo Said to Net $250 Million in Paper Profits on xAI Debt
description: Apollo Global Management Inc. has netted roughly $250 million in paper gains so far from a bet it made in recent months to support Elon Musk’s xAI.
content: Apollo Global Management Inc. has netted roughly $250 million in paper gains so far from a bet it made in recent months to support Elon Musk’s xAI.
